name: Eucalyptol
description: Eucalyptol is classified here as monoterpene oxide. This record is retained because it appears in psychoactive/traditional-use contexts, but supporting references and source-linked occurrence data are currently incomplete. Reported effects in existing notes include Clarity, calm, subtle mood lift.
summary: Eucalyptol is tracked as terpenoid in this dataset. Evidence in the current record is limited, so pharmacology details should be treated as provisional.
categoryUseContext: Natural occurrence context is currently under-documented in this record; botanical source attribution requires verification.
mechanism: Mechanism is uncertain in this dataset. Current notes suggest possible nervous-system activity, but no source-linked mechanism has been validated in this record yet.
